rulings.Case Title: QUINTEN JOSEPH FRY, BY THEO HONNIBALL, POWER OF VS. BANK OF AMERICA, NATIONAL ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTMES, INC., WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A., AS TRUSTEE FOR THE ASSET's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to July 23, 2013. Counsel for moving party is again ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C (See CGC-11-513836) and provide courtesy copy of the operative complaint to Department 501 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date no later than July 5, 2013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ALIX SANTA-IGLESIA et al VS. BALWANTSINH THAKOR, INDIVIDUALLY AND DBA THE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn Of Pltf'S Approval Of Dismissal Of Case; Ntc Of Lodgment
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF DEBORAH BASS, WILLIAM CABRAL, ANTHONY BARLOW, ARTHUR BRAY and DAVID BENAZEROFF's Motion for Approval Of Dismissal Of Case GRANTED. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KRISTI SANDFORD VS. BANK OF AMERICA, N.A., RECONTRUST COMPANY et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO MARIN COUNTY*****
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Order Vacating Dismissal And Transferring Venue To Marin County
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 3. PLAINTIFF KRISTI SANDFORD's Motion For Order Vacating Dismissal And Transferring Venue To Marin County GRANTED. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 4. PLAINTIFF HANS REINHARDT's Motion For Reconsideration Continued to July 18, 2013 to be heard by Honorable A. James Robertson II in Department 502 at 1:30 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHERONN RASHIDA JOHNSON et al VS. WARREN FOSTER et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT CHERONN JOHNSON's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Allegations are sufficient re: "breach of contract" and cross-defendant improperly raises issues of fact re: "nuisance" cause of action. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHERONN RASHIDA JOHNSON et al VS. WARREN FOSTER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 5. CROSS DEFENDANT CHERONN JOHNSON's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT DENIED. Moving party failed to cite any authority for the proposition that eviction is landlord's exclusive remedy for damages to the premises. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GSQUARED RESTAURANT VENTURES, LLC VS. COCOA DEVELOPMENT RETAIL, LLC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 6. DEFENDANT COCOA DEVELOPMENT RETAIL, LLC and TODD CHAPMAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Breach of contract cause of action is sufficiently alleged re: (1) possession; and (2) elements outlined in Del Taco as to former landlord's liability under the contract. Fraud, misrepresentation and rescission are sufficiently alleged. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL YOUNESSIAN VS. TRUST DEED INVESTMENTS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT ADAM KAHN's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Sustained without leave to amend. See Bankruptcy Court order of February 11, 2008. Request for Judicial Notice is granted. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: U.S. BANK NATIONAL ASSOCIATION AS TRUSTEE, VS. THOMAS J. DRAGON et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, June 27, 2013, line 8. DEFENDANT JAMES JONES JR.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND to allege in good faith compliance with SFRO 37.9C. = (501/REQ)
